channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: CNN delivers a harsh critique of Mamdani's plan to arrest Netanyahu
Progressive call with Abdul El-Sayed and Cori Bush labels America a 'disgusting' fascist regime
item.description: Video shows activist Kyle Kulinski comparing the U.S. and Israel to the 'fourth Reich' on a call that included Reps. Ro Khanna and Cori Bush.

item.title: ICE records 356,000 removals as Trump's enforcement push accelerates
Trump uses a never-before-employed trade weapon to expand his tariff strategy
item.description: For the first time in history, Trump invoked Section 338 of the 1930 Tariff Act, imposing 50% tariffs on Canadian goods including wine and hockey sticks.
